intro: Nemuel is the name of two men. (1.) A son of Eliab and brother of Dathan and Abiram, who perished in the wilderness with Korah's rebellion (Num. 26:9). (2.) The firstborn son of Simeon, Jacob's second son, who is also called Jemuel in Genesis 46:10 and Exodus 6:15 (1 Chr. 4:24). He founded the family of the Nemuelites (Num. 26:12). The name variation between Nemuel and Jemuel likely reflects different textual traditions.
